- Deskripsi Visual: A young person is shown in a close-up selfie reclining against patterned cushions indoors.

Main Subject:
A person with short, straight black hair and a light to medium skin tone is facing the camera. They are wearing a black short-sleeve shirt with a partially visible graphic in lighter gray and a thin chain necklace with a small pendant. Their expression is neutral with slightly pursed lips, and they look directly toward the camera. The person is leaning back against large dark cushions and appears relaxed.

Setting:
The scene is indoors, with a soft, fabric-like wall or upholstery visible in the background. Multiple cushions are behind and around the person, creating a cushioned lounge setting. Lighting is even and soft, suggesting indoor ambient light.

Visual Details:
The cushions are dark with a repeating light geometric pattern, forming a curved, padded backdrop. The person’s face is centered in the frame, and the camera angle is slightly above or level with their face, creating a relaxed close-up composition. The shirt’s printed text/graphic is visible but partly cut off by the framing. A small icon resembling a white outlined shape is visible in the upper-right corner of the image.

Visible Text:
No clearly readable important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a person reclining against patterned cushions while looking at the camera. They wear a black T-shirt with a graphic and a thin necklace, and the background is filled with dark patterned upholstery.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, overhead shot of a young Asian man with short, dark, messy hair lying down on a textured pillow. He is wearing a black t-shirt with silver lettering that reads "Trippy Summer 2021" and a delicate silver chain necklace. His eyes are looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. The lighting is soft and natural, casting subtle shadows and highlighting his features. The color palette is dominated by dark tones from his hair and shirt, contrasted with the lighter shades of the pillow and his skin. The overall mood is casual and relaxed, with a hint of youthful confidence. A small, white, cartoonish creature sticker is placed in the upper right corner of the image.
